description: Atlas is a YAML-defined semantic layer for analytics — authored by humans, consumed by AI agents.
name: io.github.AtlasDevHQ/atlas

environmentVariables.description: Analytics datasource URL (postgres, mysql, clickhouse, snowflake, duckdb, bigquery, salesforce). Optional — falls back to a bundled NovaMart SQLite demo when unset.
environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_DATASOURCE_URL

environmentVariables.description: LLM provider: anthropic, openai, bedrock, ollama, openai-compatible, gateway. Optional — the MCP server does not call an LLM directly (the client does); set this only if you also run Atlas's chat or scheduler.
environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: URL of a running Atlas API. Optional — defaults to http://localhost:3001. When set, the MCP server inherits the API's connections, semantic layer, and governance.
environmentVariables.name: ATLAS_API_URL

title: Atlas
